bg.title: Bhagavad-gītā
bg.author: Vyāsadeva / Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura (Commentary)
bg.desc: The song of God, mapping out karma, jnana, and the supreme path of pure devotion (Bhakti).

ggd.title: Gaura Gaṇoddeśa Dīpikā
ggd.author: Kavi Karṇapūra
ggd.desc: Reveals the eternal identities of Śrī Caitanya's associates as expansions of Vṛndāvana's devotees.
ggd.subtitle: Identifying the Associates of Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu
ggd.quiz_desc: Five questions drawn from the verses and teachings of Gaura Gaṇoddeśa Dīpikā. Study the identities, relationships, and pastimes of the Lord and His associates.
ggd.verse: "Dark-complexioned Lord Kṛṣṇa, whose form is eternal, blissful, and full of knowledge, formerly danced with the golden-complexioned gopīs in Vṛndāvana…"

rkgd.title: Rādhā Kṛṣṇa Gaṇoddeśa Dīpikā
rkgd.author: Rūpa Gosvāmī
rkgd.desc: Reveals the eternal identities, lineages, and groupings of the associates in Vṛndāvana.
rkgd.subtitle: Identifying the Associates of Śrī Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa
rkgd.quiz_desc: Five questions drawn from the verses and teachings of Rādhā Kṛṣṇa Gaṇoddeśa Dīpikā. Study the identities, lineages, and groupings of the associates in Vṛndāvana.
rkgd.verse: "I offer my respectful obeisances to the two lotus feet of Srimati Radharani. I offer my respectful obeisances to Lord Nandanandana, who is surrounded by the gopis and enchants the minds of the residents of Vrndavana."

parts.name: Bṛhad Bhāga (Part 1)
parts.desc: Associates, lineages, and groupings of the residents of Vṛndāvana.

parts.name: Laghu Bhāga (Part 2)
parts.desc: Kṛṣṇa's form, garments, flute, attributes, and characteristics.

vvs.title: Vraja Vilāsa Stava
vvs.author: Raghunātha Dāsa Gosvāmī
vvs.desc: Prayerful glorification of the residents of Vraja — the gopīs, gopas, and eternal associates.
vvs.subtitle: Identifying the Associates of Śrī Kṛṣṇa
vvs.quiz_desc: Five questions drawn from the verses and teachings of Vraja Vilāsa Stava. Study the identities, relationships, and pastimes of the Lord and His associates.
vvs.verse: "By tasting a single drop of the memory of the transcendental nectar ocean of the sweetness of the divine couple my heart has become restless. I bow down before the land and people of Vraja. I yearn to see my two masters."

skk.title: Śrī Kṛṣṇa-karṇāmṛtam
skk.author: Bilvamaṅgala Ṭhākura
skk.desc: Nectarean prayers and ecstatic verses describing the beauty, sweetness, and pastimes of Lord Śrī Kṛṣṇa.

bs.title: Śrī Brahma-saṁhitā
bs.author: Lord Brahmā / Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu (Discovered)
bs.desc: The prayers of Lord Brahmā glorifying Lord Kṛṣṇa (Govinda) as the primeval Lord of Goloka.
bs.subtitle: Prayers of Lord Brahmā
bs.quiz_desc: Five questions drawn from the verses and teachings of Śrī Brahma-saṁhitā. Study the prayers of Lord Brahmā glorifying Lord Kṛṣṇa (Govinda) as the primeval Lord of Goloka.
bs.verse:
"īśvaraḥ paramaḥ kṛṣṇaḥ
sac-cid-ānanda-vigrahaḥ
anādir ādir govindaḥ
sarva-kāraṇa-kāraṇam"

bb.title: Bṛhad-Bhāgavatāmṛta
bb.author: Sanātana Gosvāmī
bb.desc: A journey through the levels of devotional attainment, culminating in pure love of Kṛṣṇa.

skd.title: Saṅkalpa Kalpadruma
skd.author: Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura
skd.desc: Meditations on the daily pastimes of Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa through the eight periods of the day.

brs.title: Bhakti-rasāmṛta-sindhu
brs.author: Rūpa Gosvāmī
brs.desc: The ocean of the nectar of devotion — the definitive science of bhakti and its sixty-four practices.

un.title: Ujjvala-nīlamaṇi
un.author: Rūpa Gosvāmī
un.desc: The sapphire of mādhurya-rasa — a complete analysis of conjugal love and the nature of the gopīs.

sm.title: Stava-mālā
sm.author: Rūpa Gosvāmī
sm.desc: A garland of prayers glorifying the dhāma, the devotees, and the sweetness of Kṛṣṇa's pastimes.

vk.title: Vilāpa-kusumāñjali
vk.author: Raghunātha Dāsa Gosvāmī
vk.desc: One hundred prayers of longing to Śrī Rādhā, the supreme source of divine ecstasy.

kb.title: Kṛṣṇa-bhāvanāmṛta
kb.author: Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura
kb.desc: Vivid meditation on Kṛṣṇa's aṣṭa-kālīya-līlā — the eight-period cycle of His daily pastimes.

mk.title: Mādhurya Kādambinī
mk.author: Viśvanātha Cakravartī Ṭhākura
mk.desc: Eight showers of clouds of sweetness — mapping the progressive stages of pure devotional service.

hbv.title: Hari-bhakti-vilāsa
hbv.author: Sanātana Gosvāmī & Gopāla Bhaṭṭa Gosvāmī
hbv.desc: The manual of Vaiṣṇava conduct — the complete code of devotional life and sacred ritual.

cc.title: Caitanya-caritāmṛta
cc.author: Kṛṣṇadāsa Kavirāja Gosvāmī
cc.desc: The life and teachings of Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu — the supreme devotee and hidden avatāra.

sb.title: Śrīmad-Bhāgavatam
sb.author: Vyāsadeva
sb.desc: The spotless Purāṇa, revealing the absolute truth and the highest transcendental pastimes of Kṛṣṇa.

cb.title: Śrī Caitanya Bhāgavata
cb.author: Vṛndāvana dāsa Ṭhākura
cb.desc: The earliest biography of Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu, focusing on His early pastimes and sankirtana movement.

upd.title: Upadeśāmṛta
upd.author: Rūpa Gosvāmī
upd.desc: Eleven key instructions on controlling the senses and progressing from faith to pure love of Kṛṣṇa.

sik.title: Śikṣāṣṭaka
sik.author: Śrī Caitanya Mahāprabhu
sik.desc: Eight verses of instruction detailing the progressive stages of chanting the holy name.

jd.title: Jaiva-dharma
jd.author: Bhaktivinoda Ṭhākura
jd.desc: A spiritual novel detailing the eternal nature of the soul and the supreme path of raganuga-bhakti.

pbc.title: Prema-bhakti-candrikā
pbc.author: Narottama dāsa Ṭhākura
pbc.desc: "The Moonlight of Loving Devotion" — essential instructions on raganuga-bhakti and serving in the mood of the gopīs.

rrsn.title: Rādhā Rasa Sudhā Nidhi
rrsn.author: Prabodhānanda Sarasvatī
rrsn.desc: The nectar ocean of the liquid mellows of Srimati Radharani's sublime service and glorification.

rkgd1.title: Rādhā Kṛṣṇa Gaṇoddeśa Dīpikā
rkgd1.author: Rūpa Gosvāmī
rkgd1.desc: Reveals the eternal identities, lineages, and groupings of the associates in Vṛndāvana.
rkgd1.subtitle: Identifying the Associates of Śrī Rādhā-Kṛṣṇa
rkgd1.quiz_desc: Five questions drawn from the verses and teachings of Rādhā Kṛṣṇa Gaṇoddeśa Dīpikā. Study the identities, lineages, and groupings of the associates in Vṛndāvana.
rkgd1.verse: "I offer my respectful obeisances to the two lotus feet of Srimati Radharani. I offer my respectful obeisances to Lord Nandanandana, who is surrounded by the gopis and enchants the minds of the residents of Vrndavana."

parts.name: Bṛhad Bhāga (Part 1)
parts.desc: Associates, lineages, and groupings of the residents of Vṛndāvana.

chapters.name: Chapter 1: The Elder Relatives
chapters.desc: Questions regarding Nanda, Yasoda, Rohini, and other elders.

chapters.name: Chapter 2: The Gopis and Friends
chapters.desc: Questions regarding Radharani, the Astasakhis, and friends.

parts.name: Laghu Bhāga (Part 2)
parts.desc: Kṛṣṇa's form, garments, flute, attributes, and characteristics.
